name: Lime Jellies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and line a bar pan with foil.
2. In a small saucepan, dissolve the gelatine in hot water.
3. Add the dissolved gelatine to the sugar and cold water mixture, along with lime flavouring and green colouring. Stir quickly until combined.
4. Cook the syrup over gentle heat until it reaches 116 degrees Celsius on a sweets thermometer or forms a soft ball when tested in a cup of cold water.
5. Pour the syrup into the prepared pan and allow to cool and set.
6. Cut jellies into pieces using a wet knife.
7. Toss each jelly with a little castor sugar.
8. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 20.
